stories.title: Schema + R2 storage foundation
acceptanceCriteria: ScreenshotImage ORM model in src/data/models.py with id, content_id FK, thumbnail_url TEXT, preview_url TEXT, original_key, ocr_text, original_format VARCHAR(8), original_width, original_height, created_at — NO bytea columns
TrustedSource ORM model in src/data/models.py with all required fields including UniqueConstraint(user_id, domain)
Content model gains screenshot_image_id FK and linked_url Text columns
boto3 and pillow added to pyproject.toml dependencies
src/storage/r2_client.py created with upload() and generate_presigned_url(expires_in=86400) methods
src/config.py has R2_ACCOUNT_ID, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, R2_BUCKET_NAME, R2_PUBLIC_URL as optional string settings (empty-string defaults, no startup crash without them)
src/data/database.py has _ensure_content_screenshot_columns() Postgres-gated helper (opposite of existing SQLite-only helpers) called from init_db()
pytest tests/ passes with no new failures after schema addition

stories.title: LLMClient generalization — image_bytes param + new methods
acceptanceCriteria: Summarizer._build_request now accepts image_bytes: bytes | None = None, image_media_type: str = 'image/jpeg'
When image_bytes=None, all existing request paths are unchanged (text-only, backwards-compatible)
When image_bytes is provided, openai path content becomes multimodal array: [{type:image_url,...},{type:text,text:prompt}]
Summarizer.ocr_screenshot(image_bytes, media_type) -> tuple[str, str | None] method added
Summarizer.generate_source_narrative(source_name, kept_titles, topics, manual_context) -> str method added with max_tokens=350
ContentMetadata.__init__ accepts ocr_text, linked_url, preview_url as optional kwargs and stores them as instance attributes

ImageProcessor.process(image_bytes, media_type, idempotency_key) fleshed out: OCR via Summarizer, Pillow resize (600px/85% thumb, 1400px/92% preview), R2 upload, returns ContentMetadata with all fields populated
Existing summarizer tests still pass

stories.title: Screenshot ingest API — POST /api/v1/screenshot
acceptanceCriteria: ScreenshotShareRequest Pydantic schema in src/api/schemas.py with image_base64, original_format, width, height fields
ScreenshotURLs dataclass in src/api/schemas.py with thumbnail_url, preview_url, linked_url fields
ContentResponse gains linked_url, preview_url, screenshot_image_id optional fields
ContentResponse.from_content accepts optional screenshot_urls: ScreenshotURLs | None second argument
ScreenshotImageRepository.create() and get_map_for_content_ids() (with empty-list guard) in src/data/repository.py
ContentRepository.save_screenshot() variant that writes linked_url and screenshot_image_id to Content row
src/api/routers/screenshot.py created with POST /api/v1/screenshot — idempotency check first, 10/minute rate limit, single transaction, 201 response
screenshot router registered in src/api/app.py
Test: POST with base64 JPEG returns 201 + ContentResponse with thumbnail_url/preview_url/linked_url
Test: replaying same Idempotency-Key returns same content_id
Test: cross-user access returns 404

stories.title: Source Insights backend — GET/POST /api/v1/sources
acceptanceCriteria: SourceInsightsRepository.get_source_stats(user_id, min_saves=5, min_keep_rate=0.70) in src/data/repository.py — INNER JOIN on swipe_history, excludes content_type='image' and url=''
TrustedSourceRepository with get_all(), upsert(), get_narrative() in src/data/repository.py
SourceInsight, SourcesListResponse, SourceNarrativeResponse, SourceConfirmRequest schemas in src/api/schemas.py
GET /api/v1/sources returns domains meeting threshold union manually-added rows
POST /api/v1/sources/{domain}/confirm upserts TrustedSource, auto-detects trigger_content_id from same-day reads using user_timezone
GET /api/v1/sources/{domain}/narrative returns cached text or generates via Summarizer, caches with 7-day freshness TTL, rate-limited 20/minute
sources router registered in src/api/app.py
Test: keep-rate threshold boundary (exactly 5 saves at 70% appears; 4 saves does not)
Test: narrative cache hit (second call returns same text without LLM call)
Test: manual source confirm with null trigger_content_id works

stories.title: Chrome Extension — Capture this tab button + PrtSc toggle
acceptanceCriteria: browser-extension/src/shared/api.ts gains shareScreenshot(imageBase64, format, width, height, idempotencyKey) method mirroring shareContent auth pattern
browser-extension/src/popup/popup.html has 'Capture this tab' button (visible when logged in)
browser-extension/src/popup/popup.ts handles capture button: calls service worker, shows saving/saved state
browser-extension/src/background/service-worker.ts handles captureTab message: calls captureVisibleTab, parses data URL prefix for media type, calls shareScreenshot
PrtSc toggle in popup (default OFF), stored via storageManager, service-worker keydown listener only active when ON
Content script in browser-extension/src/content/ listens for PrintScreen keydown when toggle ON and messages service worker
TypeScript compilation succeeds (no tsc errors in extension)

stories.title: Web dashboard — screenshot item rendering
acceptanceCriteria: Content type in web-dashboard/src/types/index.ts gains screenshot_image_id, linked_url, thumbnail_url, preview_url optional fields
Library/Inbox/Archive item components render when screenshot_image_id present (no auth header — HMAC URL is auth)
Source Link shown in item detail when linked_url present — opens in new tab via window.open(url, '_blank')
Screenshot items indistinguishable in layout from URL items (same card structure)
TypeScript compilation succeeds (cd web-dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit)

stories.title: Web dashboard — Source Insights section in Analytics
acceptanceCriteria: Sources API functions (fetchSources, confirmSource, fetchNarrative) added to web-dashboard/src/api/endpoints.ts or a new sources module
SourceInsight type added to web-dashboard/src/types/index.ts
Analytics.tsx shows Sources sub-section below existing stats — fetches GET /api/v1/sources on mount
Source card has favicon (opens site in new tab via window.open), keep-rate %, save count, and a separate Detail button
Detail expander/modal shows narrative text and source stats
Manual add: '+' button triggers domain input form, calls POST /api/v1/sources/{domain}/confirm with user_timezone
TypeScript compilation succeeds

stories.title: Tests — backend unit/integration + playwright E2E
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_screenshot_api.py created: POST /api/v1/screenshot with mock R2 returns 201, idempotency replay returns same content_id, cross-user 404
tests/test_source_insights.py created: keep-rate threshold boundary tests, narrative cache hit test, manual confirm with no trigger works
pytest tests/ passes (all new + existing tests)
ruff check . passes with no errors
Playwright test in web-dashboard/tests/e2e/ verifies Analytics page shows Sources section
